---
id: post-api-v-1-messages-send
title: "Send a Message"
description: "Send a high-performance, white-labeled message (text or media) through the Noxivo engine. Supports multiple providers with automatic failover."

Send a high-performance, white-labeled message (text or media) through the Noxivo engine. Supports multiple providers with automatic failover.
